name: Albany Area YMCA
description: Albany Area YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albany, GA. There are 4 hard and wood courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and trainers or lessons.

name: Doublegate Country Club
description: Doublegate Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albany, GA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, water, lights, and locker rooms.

name: Move Christian Church
description: Move Christian Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albany, GA. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Players have access to lights and water.

name: The Club at Thornton
description: Come play pickleball at The Club at Thornton in Albany, GA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.
